title: athyrium mehrae
intro: Athyrium mehrae, also known as Mehra's lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus of flowering plants. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Athyrium mehrae include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and immunomodulator. Herbal preparations of Athyrium mehrae typically involve drying the leaves and stems of the plant, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
